summary: P0 fix verification complete: Early termination payout logic and remaining profit display working correctly. Backend APIs return paid_profit and remaining_profit. Admin panel shows correct payout calculation (principal + remaining_profit). Mobile client displays remaining profit instead of total expected.
passed_tests: API: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns paid_profit and remaining_profit for investments - PASS
API: GET /api/investments returns paid_profit and remaining_profit - PASS
API: POST /api/admin/investments/{investment_id}/terminate endpoint exists and validates - PASS
API: remaining_profit = expected_return - paid_profit calculation verified - PASS
Admin Panel: Investment list shows remaining profit (+$1,129.54 ожид. прибыль) - PASS
Admin Panel: Investment list shows paid profit (Выплачено: $70.46) - PASS
Admin Panel: Terminate dialog shows 'Общая ожид. прибыль' (total expected) - PASS
Admin Panel: Terminate dialog shows 'Уже выплачено' (already paid) - PASS
Admin Panel: Terminate dialog shows 'Осталось выплатить' (remaining to pay) - PASS
Admin Panel: Terminate dialog shows correct 'К возврату' (principal + remaining_profit) - PASS
Admin Panel: Terminate dialog explanation text correct - PASS
Mobile Dashboard: Shows 'Прогнозируемый доход' (sum of remaining profits) - PASS
Mobile Dashboard: Shows 'Общий доход' (total paid profit) - PASS
Mobile Contracts: Shows 'Ожид. прибыль' (remaining profit) per contract - PASS
Mobile Contracts: Shows 'Выплачено' (paid profit) per contract - PASS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user with 18 investments
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fix for early termination payout and remaining profit display is complete and verified. Backend APIs (admin.py, investments.py) correctly calculate and return paid_profit and remaining_profit. Admin panel (AdminUserDetail.js) shows remaining profit in investment list and correct payout calculation in terminate dialog. Mobile client (MobileDashboard.js, MobileHistory.js) displays remaining profit instead of total expected.

GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}.returns: investments with paid_profit and remaining_profit fields

GET /api/investments.returns: investments with paid_profit and remaining_profit fields

investment_list.displays: remaining profit as 'ожид. прибыль', paid profit as 'Выплачено'

terminate_dialog.explanation_text: Клиенту будет возвращена сумма инвестиции + оставшаяся прибыль

dashboard.expected_profit: Shows sum of remaining_profit from all investments
